source_pr.title: *: fix set/get var race
source_pr.body:
We may read and write user variable at same time, so I use a rw lock to avoid data race.
@zimulala @zz-jason @XuHuaiyu PTAL

root_cause_explanation: User-defined session variables could be read and written concurrently (SET_VAR/GET_VAR), causing data races and flaky -race failures. This PR adds a dedicated RW lock around the Users map (and adds a regression query) to make set/get thread-safe.
fix_pattern: Protect shared session-variable maps with RW locks to avoid concurrent read/write races.
